name: Plerng Sanaeha
original_name: เพลิงเสน่หา
overview: A selfish man causes the life of a prim and proper girl to lose everything, in turn making her to do everything she can to seek revenge with the help of a young man who uses his charm to harm the daughter of her enemy but as time passes, the revenge goes too far and is about to make her lose even more, such as her own life.

trailers.title: เพลิงเสน่หา [Official Teaser]
